title: VendorOrbit
problem_or_desire: Inconsistency in ingredient pricing across multiple wholesalers
core_concept: Unified price comparison dashboard for specific high-volume ingredients.
proposed_approach: A simple web-based spreadsheet interface where users manually input prices from 2-3 vendors to see a side-by-side comparison.
prototype_scope: A static web page with a form for manual entry and a table view for comparison. | Define 3 core ingredients (flour, sugar, dairy); Build a simple HTML/JS form for manual price entry; Implement a basic table view that highlights the lowest price per item

title: Inventory Equilibrium Scout
problem_or_desire: Balancing low inventory costs with delivery lead time requirements across geographic regions.
core_concept: Dynamic adjustment of inventory buffer stocks based on external shipping cost signals.
proposed_approach: A decision-support tool that suggests buffer stock adjustments based on static carrier rate tables and historical throughput.
prototype_scope: A dashboard that calculates and displays recommended buffer stock changes based on user-provided CSV data. | Model inventory buffer logic; Build CSV ingestion for throughput and rates; Develop recommendation engine; Create UI for manual approval of changes

title: Personalized Traceability Identity (TI)
problem_or_desire: Lack of granular detail connecting payment to specific farmer/crop outcomes in mainstream coffee service channels
core_concept: Connecting consumer spend directly to specific agricultural outcomes or beneficiaries.
proposed_approach: A loyalty program where points can be redeemed as direct donations to a specific agricultural school or project associated with the coffee origin.
prototype_scope: A manual dashboard tracking customer points and corresponding donations to a partner agricultural project. | Partner with one agricultural project.; Set up a manual tracking system for 10 customers.; Execute one donation cycle.

title: Vertical Hyper-Growth Greens Box
target_user: Small households living without access to light
problem_or_desire: Fresh, raw herbs losing structural viability within days of shop delivery
core_concept: Live subscription of micro-planters moved directly from industrial shelf to kitchen counter
proposed_approach: Retail unit which features replaceable harvest substrate cassettes specifically designed for light-starved indoor kitchens
prototype_scope: Installation of 20 live harvesting modules into resident fridges testing herb survival across fifteen separate kitchens

title: Coffee Rental & Skill Development Platform
problem_or_desire: High barrier to entry regarding technical manual pour-over hardware acquisition costs
core_concept: Circularity economy platform for premium coffee equipment trial with integrated technique support
proposed_approach: Temporary hardware consignment model featuring high-end devices like automatic pulse pour-over drippers
prototype_scope: Testing a thirty-day rental loop with five local residential customers using two popular brewing rigs

title: Legacy Archive Planner
target_user: Adults managing aging parents' digital assets
problem_or_desire: Difficulty organizing and securing digital credentials and sentimental files for inheritance.
core_concept: A secure, encrypted digital vault with automated release triggers.
proposed_approach: A web interface that guides users through a checklist of digital assets and sets up multi-factor verification for designated heirs.
prototype_scope: A secure form-based input system that generates a downloadable encrypted PDF manifest.

title: Eco-System Balancer
core_concept: A simulation game where players manage a micro-ecosystem and must balance resource consumption against population growth
proposed_approach: System dynamics modeling where every action has a delayed, cascading impact on the virtual environment
prototype_scope: A single simulation screen showing the population levels of three species and one resource slider

title: SkillSwap Ledger
problem_or_desire: Difficulty finding affordable professional services for non-core business needs.
core_concept: A non-monetary barter marketplace for professional services.
proposed_approach: A web-based credit system where users earn tokens by performing tasks and spend them on services they need.
prototype_scope: A single-category dashboard allowing users to post one service and request one service.

title: Substack Monetization Audits
problem_or_desire: Creators struggling to convert free subscribers into paid members
core_concept: A structured 10-point audit framework specifically for Substack pricing page conversion.
proposed_approach: A specialized consulting service providing a standardized 10-point audit of Substack landing pages to improve conversion rates.
prototype_scope: Perform 10 manual audits for free in exchange for testimonials and case studies. | Define the 10-point audit criteria.; Identify 20 potential Substack creators.; Conduct 10 audits via Loom video.; Collect feedback and conversion data.

title: Post-Coffee Circadian Monitoring
problem_or_desire: Overdose on caffeine causing unintended interference with evening sleep and focus patterns
core_concept: Optimizing roast and amount delivered based on real-time sleep readiness tracker integration
proposed_approach: Interface querying wearable physiological sensors (HEV or similar devices) to curate caffeine volume/roast lightened levels each day before purchase/dispensing
prototype_scope: Beta software connecting current fitness sensor sleep summaries with a personalized daily intake delivery recommendation chart sent daily via manual email dispatch
